title: Discover Sikkim and Darjeeling Himalayan Highlights Tour
shortDescription: Experience the timeless charm of the Eastern Himalayas with this immersive Sikkim and Darjeeling journey.
description: Experience the timeless charm of the Eastern Himalayas with this immersive Sikkim and Darjeeling journey. From the cultural vibrance of Gangtok and the pristine valleys of Lachung to the scenic beauty of Pelling and the colonial elegance of Darjeeling, this tour blends nature, heritage, and mountain serenity. Witness breathtaking landscapes, peaceful monasteries, and iconic viewpoints for a truly memorable Himalayan escape.

itinerary.title: Arrival at Gangtok – Welcome to Sikkim
itinerary.description: Arrive at Bagdogra Airport or NJP Railway Station and transfer to Gangtok. Spend the rest of the day at leisure and enjoy an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Gangtok Local Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Explore Gangtok’s major attractions including monasteries, viewpoints, and local markets, experiencing the cultural essence of Sikkim.

itinerary.title: Gangtok to Lachung – Into the High Valleys
itinerary.description: Drive through scenic mountain roads and waterfalls to reach Lachung, a peaceful Himalayan village, for an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Lachung – Yumthang Valley Excursion
itinerary.description: Visit the stunning Yumthang Valley and nearby attractions before returning to Lachung, surrounded by alpine beauty.

itinerary.title: Lachung to Pelling – Scenic Mountain Drive
itinerary.description: Travel from Lachung to Pelling, enjoying panoramic Himalayan views and serene landscapes en route.

itinerary.title: Pelling to Darjeeling – From Sikkim to Bengal Hills
itinerary.description: After local sightseeing in Pelling, proceed to Darjeeling, the Queen of Hills, for an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Darjeeling Sightseeing – Sunrise & Heritage
itinerary.description: Witness sunrise at Tiger Hill followed by visits to monasteries, tea gardens, and local landmarks.

itinerary.title: Darjeeling – Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to Bagdogra Airport or NJP Railway Station with unforgettable memories of Sikkim and Darjeeling.

services: Accommodation in comfortable hotels on twin sharing basis
Daily meals (Veg / Non-Veg as per plan)
All transfers and sightseeing by suitable vehicle
Pickup and drop from Airport / Railway Station
Driver allowance, toll taxes, and parking charges

title: Arunachal Pradesh Himalayan Journey via Shergaon, Tawang & Dirang
shortDescription: Discover the pristine beauty of Arunachal Pradesh through Shergaon, Tawang, and Dirang on this scenic Himalayan journey.
description: Discover the pristine beauty of Arunachal Pradesh on this scenic winter journey through Shergaon, Tawang, and Dirang. Traverse high-altitude mountain passes, witness historic war memorials, explore ancient monasteries, and soak in breathtaking Himalayan landscapes, making this tour an ideal blend of culture, nature, and adventure.

itinerary.title: Guwahati to Shergaon – Gateway to Arunachal
itinerary.description: Arrive at Guwahati and drive through picturesque mountain roads to Shergaon. Spend time at leisure for acclimatization and enjoy an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Shergaon to Tawang – High Passes & Waterfalls
itinerary.description: Journey towards Tawang via the iconic Sela Pass. Visit the War Cemetery, Jaswant Garh War Memorial, and the stunning Nuranang Falls en route.

itinerary.title: Tawang Exploration – Borders or Monasteries
itinerary.description: Choose between an adventurous visit to Bumla Pass and alpine lakes or explore Tawang Monastery, Singsor Ani Gompa, and the War Memorial.

itinerary.title: Tawang to Dirang – Valleys & Hot Springs
itinerary.description: Drive to Dirang and explore the natural hot water spring, the serene Sangti Valley, and the peaceful Dirang Monastery.

itinerary.title: Dirang to Guwahati – Departure
itinerary.description: Return to Guwahati with unforgettable memories and proceed to the airport or railway station for your onward journey.

services: Private A/C vehicle for transfers and sightseeing
Same vehicle and driver throughout the tour
Parking fees, toll taxes, and driver allowances
Inner Line Permit (ILP) for Arunachal Pradesh

title: Meghalaya Explorer Getaway
shortDescription: Experience the highlights of Meghalaya with this short and immersive getaway covering Shillong, Dawki, Mawlynnong, and Cherrapunjee.
description: Experience the highlights of Meghalaya on this thoughtfully designed 3 Nights / 4 Days explorer getaway starting and ending in Guwahati. Travel through Shillong, Dawki, Mawlynnong, and Cherrapunjee while discovering pristine rivers, cascading waterfalls, scenic viewpoints, and rich local culture. Ideal for short vacations, this trip blends comfort, light adventure, and immersive nature experiences, offering a refreshing escape into the untouched beauty of North East India.

itinerary.title: Guwahati to Shillong
itinerary.description: Arrive at Guwahati Airport or Railway Station. Visit Kamakhya Devi Temple and proceed to Shillong. En route, stop at Umiam Lake and Nehru Park. Check into your hotel. Optional evening visit to Police Bazaar. Overnight stay in Shillong.

itinerary.title: Shillong – Amlarem – Dawki
itinerary.description: After breakfast, drive to Amlarem and visit Krangsuri Falls with optional zip-lining. Enjoy a boat ride to Phe Phe Falls. Continue to Dawki and check in to a campsite or homestay. Overnight stay in Dawki.

itinerary.title: Dawki – Mawlynnong – Cherrapunjee
itinerary.description: Enjoy morning water activities in Dawki River. Drive to Mawlynnong, Asia’s cleanest village. Visit the single living root bridge and balancing rock. Optional visit to Garden of Caves. Overnight stay in Cherrapunjee.

itinerary.title: Cherrapunjee Sightseeing – Guwahati Drop
itinerary.description: After breakfast, explore Seven Sisters Falls, Thangkharang Park, Nohkalikai Falls, Arwah Cave, and Lyngksiar Falls (subject to access). In the evening, drive to Guwahati for departure.

services: 1 Night in Shillong, 1 Night in Dawki, 1 Night in Cherrapunjee

title: The Meghalaya Adventure Trip
shortDescription: Experience the raw beauty of Meghalaya with this immersive adventure trip covering Shillong, Dawki, Mawlynnong, and Cherrapunjee.
description: Experience the raw beauty of Meghalaya on this immersive 5 Nights / 6 Days adventure trip starting and ending in Guwahati. From misty hill towns and crystal-clear rivers to living root bridges and thrilling treks, this journey blends nature, culture, and adventure seamlessly. Explore Shillong, Dawki, Mawlynnong, and Cherrapunjee while enjoying handpicked stays, scenic drives, and unforgettable experiences surrounded by the pristine landscapes of North East India.

itinerary.title: Guwahati to Shillong
itinerary.description: Arrive at Guwahati Airport or Railway Station. Visit Kamakhya Devi Temple and proceed to Shillong. En route, stop at Umiam Lake and Nehru Park. Check in to your hotel. Overnight stay in Shillong.

itinerary.title: Shillong – Amlarem – Dawki
itinerary.description: After breakfast, drive to Amlarem and visit Krangsuri Falls with optional zip-lining. Enjoy a boat ride to Phe Phe Falls. Continue to Dawki and check in to a campsite or homestay. Overnight stay in Dawki.

itinerary.title: Dawki – Mawlynnong – Cherrapunjee
itinerary.description: Enjoy morning water activities in Dawki River including boating, cliff jumping, and snorkeling. Drive to Mawlynnong, Asia’s cleanest village. Visit the single living root bridge and balancing rock. Optional visit to Garden of Caves. Overnight stay in Cherrapunjee.

itinerary.title: Cherrapunjee Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Explore Seven Sisters Falls, Thangkharang Park, Nohkalikai Falls, Arwah Cave, and Lyngksiar Falls. Optional visits depend on accessibility. Overnight stay in Cherrapunjee.

itinerary.title: Double Decker Root Bridge Trek – Shillong
itinerary.description: Early morning departure to Tyrna village. Trek down approximately 3,700 steps to witness the iconic Double Decker Living Root Bridge and Rainbow Falls. Trek back and drive to Shillong. Overnight stay in Shillong.

itinerary.title: Shillong to Guwahati
itinerary.description: After breakfast, visit Police Bazaar, Don Bosco Museum, and Cathedral Church. Drive to Guwahati for departure.

services: 2 Nights in Shillong, 1 Night in Dawki, 2 Nights in Cherrapunjee

description: Visit Sydney’s iconic landmarks, enjoy the natural wonder of the Great Barrier Reef in Cairns, and explore Melbourne’s scenic Great Ocean Road. Discover diverse landscapes, cultural attractions, and exciting experiences with expert guidance. Travel in comfort with private transfers and luxury accommodations. This adventure blends city life, nature, and unique experiences for an all-around Australian journey.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Sydney
itinerary.description: Arrive in Sydney and transfer to your hotel. Spend the day at leisure exploring the city or relaxing after your journey.

itinerary.title: Sydney – Opera House & Bondi Beach
itinerary.description: Explore Sydney’s iconic attractions including the Sydney Opera House and Bondi Beach, experiencing the vibrant coastal lifestyle.

itinerary.title: Day Trip to Blue Mountains
itinerary.description: Enjoy a scenic excursion to the Blue Mountains, known for its dramatic landscapes, valleys, and natural beauty.

itinerary.title: Sydney to Cairns – Great Barrier Reef
itinerary.description: Fly to Cairns and prepare for your Great Barrier Reef experience. Check in to your hotel and relax.

itinerary.title: Great Barrier Reef Experience
itinerary.description: Enjoy snorkeling and diving at the world-famous Great Barrier Reef, exploring vibrant marine life and coral formations.

itinerary.title: Cairns to Melbourne
itinerary.description: Fly to Melbourne and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: Great Ocean Road Tour
itinerary.description: Embark on a scenic drive along the Great Ocean Road, witnessing stunning coastal views, cliffs, and iconic landmarks.

itinerary.title: Departure from Melbourne
itinerary.description: Transfer to the airport for your departure with unforgettable memories of your Australian journey.

Meet and greet assistance at airport

itinerary.description: Travel from Istanbul to Cappadocia and check in to your hotel. Enjoy the evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: Cappadocia Tour & Hot Air Balloon
itinerary.description: Experience Cappadocia’s unique landscapes and enjoy an optional hot air balloon ride over the fairy chimneys.

itinerary.title: Cappadocia to Antalya
itinerary.description: Travel to Antalya and check in to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: Antalya Exploration
itinerary.description: Explore Antalya’s beaches, old town, and scenic coastal views.

itinerary.title: Pamukkale & Kusadasi
itinerary.description: Visit Pamukkale’s famous travertine terraces and continue to Kusadasi for an overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to the airport for your departure with unforgettable memories of Turkey.

services: All sightseeing entry as per itinerary
Meet and greet assistance at airport

title: Enchanting Philippines Getaway
shortDescription: Explore Manila and Cebu with cultural tours, island adventures, and scenic experiences in the Philippines.
description: Experience the breathtaking beauty of the Philippines with this 5 Nights / 6 Days tour. From the historic charm of Manila to the tropical wonders of Cebu, this journey blends cultural exploration, scenic cruises, and island adventures into one unforgettable escape. Enjoy seamless travel, luxury accommodations, and personalized service every step of the way.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Manila & City Tour
itinerary.description: Arrive in Manila and enjoy a city tour covering major attractions. Transfer to your hotel for overnight stay.

itinerary.title: Intramuros & Sunset Cruise
itinerary.description: Explore the historic Intramuros district followed by a scenic sunset cruise experience.

itinerary.title: Fly to Cebu
itinerary.description: Transfer to the airport and fly to Cebu. Check in to your hotel and spend the day at leisure.

itinerary.title: Mactan Island & Water Activities
itinerary.description: Explore Mactan Island and enjoy water sports and beach activities.

itinerary.title: Chocolate Hills & Tarsier Sanctuary
itinerary.description: Take an excursion to Bohol to visit the Chocolate Hills and the Tarsier Sanctuary.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to the airport for your departure with unforgettable memories of the Philippines.

services: All sightseeing entry as per itinerary
Meet and greet assistance at airport

title: Bali Bliss Adventure
shortDescription: Explore Bali’s temples, beaches, and cultural landmarks with a perfect mix of adventure and relaxation.
description: Discover the tropical paradise of Bali with this 4 Nights / 5 Days tour. From majestic temples and cultural landmarks to thrilling adventures and pristine beaches, this trip offers the perfect blend of relaxation and exploration. Enjoy luxury accommodations, private transportation, and personalized guidance for a seamless Bali experience.

itinerary.title: Arrival & Tanah Lot Temple
itinerary.description: Arrive in Bali and transfer to your hotel. Visit the iconic Tanah Lot Temple known for its scenic ocean views.

itinerary.title: GWK Park & Uluwatu Temple
itinerary.description: Explore Garuda Wisnu Kencana (GWK) Cultural Park and visit Uluwatu Temple perched on a dramatic cliff.

itinerary.title: Ubud Tour & Bali Swing
itinerary.description: Discover Ubud’s cultural attractions including temples, rice terraces, and enjoy the famous Bali Swing experience.

itinerary.title: Nusa Penida Day Trip
itinerary.description: Take a full-day excursion to Nusa Penida Island, exploring its stunning beaches and scenic viewpoints.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Transfer to the airport for your departure with unforgettable memories of Bali.

services: All sightseeing entry as per itinerary
Meet and greet assistance at airport

title: Vietnam Wonders Adventure
shortDescription: Explore Hanoi, Halong Bay, and Ho Chi Minh City with cultural tours, scenic cruises, and vibrant city experiences.
description: Explore the cultural richness and scenic beauty of Vietnam with this 4 Nights / 5 Days tour. From bustling Hanoi to the stunning waters of Halong Bay and the vibrant streets of Ho Chi Minh City, enjoy luxury accommodations, private transportation, and guided sightseeing for an unforgettable Vietnamese experience.

itinerary.title: Arrival in Hanoi & City Tour
itinerary.description: Arrive in Hanoi and enjoy a guided city tour covering major cultural and historical attractions.

itinerary.title: Ninh Binh Tour
itinerary.description: Take a scenic excursion to Ninh Binh, known for its limestone landscapes, rivers, and temples.

itinerary.title: Halong Bay Cruise
itinerary.description: Enjoy a day cruise in Halong Bay, exploring its stunning limestone karsts and emerald waters.

itinerary.title: Hanoi to Ho Chi Minh City
itinerary.description: Fly from Hanoi to Ho Chi Minh City and transfer to your hotel. Spend the evening at leisure.

itinerary.title: Cu Chi Tunnels & City Tour
itinerary.description: Visit the historic Cu Chi Tunnels followed by a city tour of Ho Chi Minh City.

services: All sightseeing entry as per itinerary
Meet and greet assistance at airport
